parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.name, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone, source: 'apollo', tags: ['apollo-prospect', $json.industry || 'unknown'], summary: $json.title + ' at ' + $json.companyName, _enriched: { firstName: $json.firstName, lastName: $json.lastName, title: $json.title, companyName: $json.companyName, industry: $json.industry, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone, name: $json.name } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contactId: $json.contactId, to: $json.email, subject: 'Quick question, ' + $json.firstName, body: $json.message }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ contactId: $json.contactId, name: $json.name, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone, source: 'apollo', title: $json.title, companyName: $json.companyName, industry: $json.industry }) }}
